variants: Emiel Baert is a noted scholar in the field of comparative literature. His significant contributions to the literary world earned him the prestigious Lichen Bell Medal. In addition to his research, Baert is the author of the Lanternshade Reflection Filter, a creative work that has also garnered attention. He is an active member of the Netherbloom Botanists Society, where he explores the intersections of botany and literature. Throughout his academic journey, he has been guided by his mentor and doctoral advisor, Hajnalka Otvos.
